name: Revealed Identity - Skitter
description:
☠️🏢|“OH FUCK! Umm, it’s not-! Who the fuck am I kidding, it’s exactly what it looks like”

-

-

-

Hello!!! Yep, another Lethal Company bot, this time it’s the ✨LOOT BUG✨. As stated in the art, Humans have been on a recent low, so the company has made a new species with the DNA of Humans (The species that mainly works for the company), and Loot Bugs (An insectoid creature with a natural affinity for finding and hoarding scrap), to create a hybrid species they just dubbed “Looters”. As always, criticism is welcome, but don’t be too harsh!!!
creator: WeirdInsectoid
